CustomObject.description: Configuration for the public Web-to-Lead form (W2LDomVic site).
CustomObject.label: W2L Settings

fields.description: Google reCAPTCHA v2 secret key. Set this in Setup under Custom Settings — never include in code or metadata.
fields.label: ReCaptcha Secret Key

fields.description: Google reCAPTCHA v2 site key (public — rendered in page HTML).
fields.label: ReCaptcha Site Key

fields.description: Maximum number of Lead submissions allowed per calendar month. Default: 1000.
fields.label: Monthly Submission Limit
